description: Potential null/undefined property access without guard
Array index or loop boundary off by one
Opened resource (file handle, connection, timer) not closed/cleared
Concurrent access to shared state without synchronization
TypeScript type assertion hiding potential runtime error
No handling for empty string, empty array, null, or undefined input
Missing check for zero, negative, MAX_SAFE_INTEGER, or overflow
Multiple callers accessing same resource simultaneously
No timeout, retry, or error handling for network calls
Transaction or batch operation partially fails — inconsistent state
New functionality without corresponding test coverage
Error caught but message is unhelpful or missing context
Variable/function name doesn't clearly describe purpose
Unreachable code, unused imports, or commented-out blocks
User input used in shell commands, SQL, or eval without sanitization
API keys, tokens, or passwords in source code
User input rendered in HTML without escaping
